text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, January 16. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sleep quality is so important. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Reviewing our household budget today. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's break this down. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: I checked the recent logs for that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that calculating some savings estimates. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Good focus area. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Good focus area. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
